data.name: 深紅之獄的女劍士 - 蒂娜
data.detailed_description:
After successfully dealing with an evil witch, Tina is tasked with investigating Durham, a village dealing with a surge of crime.

Before long, she begins to notice that ordinary people are the ones turning to criminal behavior.

To make things worse, the witch she had thought she defeated has reemerged!

Features

  • Classic RPG experience

  • Explore a fantasy village and castle

  • Engaging story

  • Two playable characters

  • Chapter skip function

  • Battles can be retried if defeated

  • Includes exclusive additional content from the 2.0 version
data.about_the_game:
After successfully dealing with an evil witch, Tina is tasked with investigating Durham, a village dealing with a surge of crime.

Before long, she begins to notice that ordinary people are the ones turning to criminal behavior.

To make things worse, the witch she had thought she defeated has reemerged!

Features

  • Classic RPG experience

  • Explore a fantasy village and castle

  • Engaging story

  • Two playable characters

  • Chapter skip function

  • Battles can be retried if defeated

  • Includes exclusive additional content from the 2.0 version
data.short_description: Play as Tina and Cecile as they investigate Durham and try to uncover the cause of the village's sudden surge of crime. With the reappearance of an old foe, their job won't be easy.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and shinachiku-castella All Rights Reserved.
